name: Pipe saddle clamp
alternativeNames: Saddle clamp, pipe strap, conduit clamp, hose clamp, P-clamp
description: Curved cradle that wraps over a round pipe/conduit/hose, with a flat base and side tabs for screw-down mounting. Pipe axis runs along X; base sits flat on the bed (saddle opens +Z). The underside of the saddle is a bridge — keep diameter modest or enable the bridge support strut. For large pipes, print on the side (rotate about X) for stronger layer orientation.

parameters.label: Pipe outer diameter
parameters.description: Nominal OD of the pipe/conduit/hose being clamped (e.g. 22.3 mm = ½" PVC, 26.7 mm = ¾" PVC, 21.3 mm = ½" EMT, 32 mm = 1" PVC).

parameters.label: Strap width
parameters.description: Width of the saddle along the pipe axis (X). Wider straps grip more contact area but use more filament.

parameters.label: Strap (wall) thickness
parameters.description: Wall thickness of the curved saddle around the pipe. Below ~2 mm tabs and saddle wall become fragile.

parameters.label: Tab length (each side)
parameters.description: Flat ear extending from each side of the saddle to host the mounting screw. Measured from the saddle outer edge outward.

parameters.label: Base / tab thickness
parameters.description: Thickness of the flat tabs that contact the mounting surface (Z). Set ≥ strap thickness for stiffness; thinner tabs crack around the screw head.

parameters.label: Pipe lift above base
parameters.description: Gap between the base top face and the bottom of the pipe. Use a small lift (1–3 mm) for cable routing behind the pipe, or to shorten the underside bridge span.

parameters.label: Wrap angle
parameters.description: How far the saddle wraps around the pipe, in degrees from straight-up (180° = full half-circle, 210°–240° = beyond the equator for snap retention, requires flexible material). Larger wraps grip better but increase the bridge span underneath.

parameters.label: Pipe diametral clearance
parameters.description: Added to the pipe diameter for a working fit (slip fit ≈ 0.2–0.4 mm; tight clamping fit ≈ 0.0–0.2 mm). Tune to your printer.

parameters.label: Mounting hole diameter
parameters.description: Used when "Custom" bolt size is selected in the mounting section. Through the tabs into the mount surface.

parameters.label: Mount holes per tab
parameters.description: Through-holes per side tab, distributed along the pipe axis (X).

parameters.label: Hole edge offset
parameters.description: Inset from each tab outer edge (X end) for the first/last hole center. Also applied from the saddle wall side so the screw head clears the curved wall.

parameters.label: Countersunk holes
parameters.description: Conical recess on the top face of each tab for flat-head mounting screws so heads sit flush. Countersink angle follows bolt preset (90° metric, 82° UNC).

parameters.label: Slotted mount holes
parameters.description: Elongate the mounting holes along X for alignment adjustment along the pipe run.

parameters.label: Extra slot length
parameters.description: Added length (mm) along X beyond the bolt clearance diameter.

parameters.label: Side buttresses
parameters.description: Adds triangular gussets on the outsides of the saddle (front and back faces in X) to brace the cradle against the base. Recommended for pipes ≥ 30 mm or any cantilever load on the pipe.

parameters.label: Buttress height
parameters.description: How far each buttress rises up the saddle wall from the base (along Z). Capped to the saddle outer height.

parameters.label: Buttress thickness
parameters.description: Buttress extent along the pipe axis (X). Centered on each saddle face so changing thickness grows equally to both sides.

parameters.label: Saddle edge chamfer
parameters.description: Small chamfer on the top open edge of the saddle so the pipe slides in cleanly and stress concentrates less. 0 disables.

parameters.label: Bridge support strut
parameters.description: Adds a thin sacrificial wall under the saddle bridge (between pipe bottom and base) to assist FDM bridging. Snip away after printing. Auto-suggested when the underside span exceeds the printability warning threshold (~10 mm).

parameters.label: Minimum hole-to-edge
parameters.description: Keeps mounting hole centers away from tab edges so the tab cannot break out around the screw.

parameters.label: XY hole compensation
parameters.description: Extra radius on mounting holes for printer tolerance (subtract from nominal).
